description: Eval dataset for a customer support QA/RAG system covering intent classification, retrieval quality, answer grounding, ambiguity handling, and escalation behavior.

samples.question: How do I request a refund for my order?
samples.ground_truth: You can request a refund within 30 days of purchase by contacting support with your order number.
ground_truth_contexts: Refund Policy: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of the original purchase date by contacting our support team with their order number.
expected_answer_points: Asks for or mentions the order number
Explains that support should be contacted

samples.question: I bought this last week. Can I still get my money back?
samples.ground_truth: If your purchase is within 30 days, you can request a refund by contacting support and providing your order number.
ground_truth_contexts: Refund Policy: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of the original purchase date by contacting our support team with their order number.
expected_answer_points: Maps 'last week' to refund eligibility window
